title: Peppery Cucumber Soup
description: A refreshing and light soup perfect for warm weather. This soup combines the flavors of peppery greens with the crunch of fresh cucumber.
instructions: Chop the cucumber and peppery greens into small pieces.
In a large pot, heat the soup broth over medium heat.
Add the chopped cucumber and peppery greens to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Stir in the crumbly cheese until melted.
Season with brazilian spices to taste.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with additional peppery greens if desired.
